Name: Standard Room - Nightly
Description: Standard en-suite double room, Sky Road, Clifden. Includes full Irish breakfast.

Name: Sea View Room - Nightly
Description: En-suite double room with Atlantic sea views. Includes full Irish breakfast.

Name: Clifden Suite - Nightly
Description: Premium suite with sitting area and panoramic Connemara views. Includes full Irish breakfast.

Name: Full Irish Breakfast - Guest Supplement
Description: Full Irish breakfast for additional guests (children or non-residents).

Name: Airport Transfer - Knock (NOC)
Description: Return transfer from Ireland West Knock Airport, arranged by Hampton's Rest.

Name: Airport Transfer - Shannon (SNN)
Description: Return transfer from Shannon Airport, arranged by Hampton's Rest.

Name: Packed Lunch - Connemara Walking
Description: Packed lunch for two, suitable for Sky Road or Connemara National Park walks.

Name: Bike Rental - Half Day
Description: Mountain bike hire, half day (4 hours). Helmets included.

Name: Bike Rental - Full Day
Description: Mountain bike hire, full day (8 hours). Helmets included.

Name: Connemara Guide Service
Description: Half-day guided walk of the Sky Road and Clifden surroundings with local guide.

Name: Gift Voucher - Weekend Break
Description: Hampton's Rest gift voucher redeemable against any room booking.

Name: Artisan Welcome Basket
Description: Locally sourced welcome basket: Connemara Smokehouse salmon, Aran oatcakes, craft jam, and Clifden cheese.

Name: Wedding Night Package
Description: Bridal suite upgrade with champagne, floral arrangement, and late check-out.
